contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Fix Sophia submit_contribution approval-gate infinite loop
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/251
  
  Details:
  Diagnosed + fixed the infinite loop on the Sophia Telegram thread. Logs showed 0 auto-advance dispatches but 27 submit_contribution calls — ruled out the just-shipped auto-advance feature. Root cause: the approval gate (app/main.py, added b0b134b 2026-05-05 for QR INVENTORY MOVEMENT) is keyed on a QR code but applied to ALL submit_contribution calls; a no-QR CONTRIBUTION EVENT can never satisfy the QR-based approval -> approved stays False -> always returns pending 'Waiting for your approval' -> the model re-calls the tool to the round cap. Fix (#251): gated the approval behind REQUIRE_SUBMISSION_APPROVAL (default false) so signed submissions execute directly (the RSA signature is the authorization); set the flag true to restore the Approve/Reject card. Merged + deployed non-force to the box (idle, HEAD daa21ca, /health ok). 570 unit tests pass. Also stabilized the live incident (restart broke the loop; auto-advance left off as a precaution though it was not the cause).
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
